relative_path: PERSONNEL/Hiring/Recruitment/Experimental postdoc call 2024-2025/Rejection letter AEZ draft.docx
full_text:
Dear Ahmed,

Thank you for taking the time to attend the first round of interviews. We have now made our decisions based on these interviews, and unfortunately we will not proceed with your application to the second round.

We thank you for taking part in the interview process, and would like to share feedback on your interview to provide clarity on our decision and offer insights that may be helpful for future opportunities:

We enjoyed your clear presentation, and we highly appreciated your scientific curiosity to understand molecular mechanisms, and drive for an academic career.

You have extensive experimental expertise in establishment and utilization of mouse models. However your expertise does not very closely match with our current research goals, and would perhaps be better suited to projects utilizing mouse models.

During your presentation, it could have been more clear what your exact contributions were to each of the projects you presented. We felt that it would have been better if you focused on your first-author publications, as this would highlight your role, demonstrating the leadership and commitment to research.
